query:
SELECT e.id, e.evseIdLocal, e.connectorId, e.status, e.connectorType, e.powerKw, cs.name as station_name, cs.ocppIdentity 
FROM evses e 
JOIN charging_stations cs ON e.stationId = cs.id 
LIMIT 10;
